name: adult savory stew with beef & vegetables dog food
description: hill's science diet adult savory stew with beef & vegetables is a delicious way to provide precisely balanced nutrition that enhances the overall health and well-being of your pet. made with real meat, brown rice, and a medley of delectable vegetables including peas and carrots, all smothered in a delicious gravy. high-quality protein for lean muscles made with purposeful ingredients for a flavorful, nutritious meal easy to digest formulated with key nutrients to support your pet’s stage of life pair this mouth watering stew with hill's science diet dry food to indulge your dog in tail wagging
